en.textPopUpTryAgain: Let's try to be more careful!
en.textCompletedReturnBonus: You've completed $ levels in your last playthrough.
en.textBonusReturnBonus: Your bonus is: $ power up points!
en.textWrongAnswer: Oops! It seems you got the answer wrong but don't worry! Let's try again!
en.textHealRight: Nice one! You healed by answering that right.
en.textHealWrong: Oh no! You could have healed by answering that right. But you can try again later.
en.textTutorialWalkPC: To Walk use the Arrow Keys or WASD
en.textTutorialGameplay:
Keep a safe distance from the number blocks!

Defeat all to gain score and upgrade your level!
en.textTutorialDashPC: To Dash use the space Key or this button on the Screen
en.textTutorialHealthPC: Click here or use the Z Key, to heal a little health
en.textTutorialHealthMOBILE: Click here to heal a little health
en.textTutorialTiers:
All cards must be on the same Tier so you can upgrade their levels.

When upgrading a Tier you will gain a especial reward!
en.textTutorialUpgratedTierVelocity: Congrats! By tiering up you won a dash upgrade!
en.textTutorialUpgratedTierDamage: Congrats! By tiering up you won a new shooting direction to upgrate!
en.textTutorialUpgratedTierLife: Congrats! By tiering up you won a pencil that will circle around you, damaging all blocks that touch it!
en.textQuestionPopUp: Oh no! Your health is getting low, would you like to answser a question to heal a bit?
